fields.summary: Add user profile page with avatar upload
fields.description:
As a user, I want to view and edit my profile information including uploading a profile picture.

## Requirements
- Display user name, email, bio
- Allow editing all profile fields
- Support avatar image upload (max 5MB, jpg/png)
- Show upload progress
- Validate image dimensions (min 100x100, max 2000x2000)

## Technical Notes
- Backend: new /api/users/{id}/profile endpoint
- Frontend: new ProfilePage component
- Store images in S3

comments.body: Design mockups are in Figma: [link]. Please follow the existing card layout pattern.
